name: Broiled Scampi Romano (Monday)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds large shrimp, peeled and deveined
rice or angel hair pasta -- for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the reserved dressing and the grated Parmesan cheese in a bowl.
2. Toss the shrimp with the marinade until well coated.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
4. Remove the shrimp from the marinade and grill or broil over medium heat, about 4 inches from the flame.
5. Cook the shrimp for 1 to 2 minutes on each side, basting with additional marinade as needed.
6. Continue cooking until the shrimp are firm and opaque.
7. Serve hot with rice or pasta and a green vegetable, if desired.
